privileged_info_summary: All five target papers are real, peer-reviewed publications with correct venues: (1) 'Attention is All You Need' published at NeurIPS 2017; (2) 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' published at CVPR 2016; (3) 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding' published at NAACL 2019; (4) 'Dropout: A Simple Way to Prevent Neural Networks from Overfitting' published in JMLR 2014; (5) 'Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization' published at ICLR 2015. The task requires creating a .bib file at ~/Documents/deep_learning.bib and a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Bibliography Sources'.
